items.summary: Debug and fix the admin route component in frontend/src/App.tsx to identify why the permissions check is stuck in a loading state and never resolves to display the AdminPanel component or access denied message

Add comprehensive error handling and timeout logic to the admin route permissions check in frontend/src/App.tsx to prevent infinite loading states when the backend isCallerAdmin call hangs or fails silently

Verify the useIsOwner hook in frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts correctly handles the React Query loading states and errors, ensuring it does not return an undefined or permanently loading state that causes the admin route to hang

Add frontend console logging in the admin route component to output the complete state of the permissions check including: isLoading value, isError value, isOwner value, error object if present, and the exact render decision being made
